description: Hearst Digital Audience & Subscription Analytics — Gold layer star schema optimized for Direct Lake semantic models.
note: This lakehouse uses schema-enabled mode with explicit 'gold' schema for all tables. Delta tables are created via PySpark saveAsTable() with schema prefix (e.g., lh_hearst_gold.gold.dim_date). Metadata-only deployment: table definitions are promoted via Fabric Deployment Pipeline, but DATA must be regenerated in each environment (Dev/UAT/Prod) by running the medallion notebooks (bronze → silver → gold).
dataLoadStrategy: Run nb_hearst_bronze_ingest → nb_hearst_silver_transform → nb_hearst_gold_build in sequence post-deployment to populate tables in each environment.
